task_completion.description: Verify the contact's name and company are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a contact creation form or saved contact record showing the name 'Patricia Nguyen' and the company 'Westfield Industries'.

task_completion.description: Verify the contact's email, phone, and job position are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the email 'patricia.nguyen@westfield.com', phone '+1-555-0250', and job position 'Director of Operations' in the contact details.

task_completion.description: Verify the calendar event is created with the correct title on the upcoming Friday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a calendar event or event creation form with the title 'Onboarding Call - Westfield Industries' scheduled on the upcoming Friday.

task_completion.description: Verify the event is scheduled for the correct time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the event start time set to 2:00 PM (14:00) and end time set to 3:00 PM (15:00), indicating a 1-hour duration.

task_completion.description: Verify the event location and description are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the location field set to 'Zoom Meeting' and a description containing 'Initial onboarding discussion covering platform setup, team access, and implementation timeline'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new contact is added as an attendee to the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Patricia Nguyen' listed in the attendees, guests, or participants field of the calendar event.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine CRM or Calendar GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real graphical user interface (like Odoo or another CRM/Calendar app), not a text editor, terminal, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the UI rather than using terminal commands to inject data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen clicking buttons, navigating menus, and typing into form fields rather than executing scripts or API calls in a terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the records appear to be genuinely created within the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard application confirmation states, such as saved record views, calendar grid blocks, or success toasts, rather than just typed text in unsaved forms at the end of the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Contact Details - Name: Patricia Nguyen, Email: patricia.nguyen@westfield.com, Phone: +1-555-0250, Job Position: Director of Operations, Company: Westfield Industries. Event Details - Title: 'Onboarding Call - Westfield Industries', Time: 14:00 to 15:00 (2:00 PM - 3:00 PM) for 1 hour duration, Location: 'Zoom Meeting', Description must contain keywords 'onboarding' and 'setup'. Attendee: Patricia Nguyen must be linked to the event.
